name: uspec-repo
description: Source repo for the uSpec CLI, Figma plugin, and skill source. Not published.

scripts.build:cli: cd packages/cli && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build
scripts.dev:render: cd packages/cli && node dist/index.js render --target cursor --out ../.. && node dist/index.js render --target claude-code --out ../.. && node dist/index.js render --target codex --out ../..
